elements.text: Your family is planning a big vacation in a few years. You wonder what life will look like for you by then and whether the vacation will be possible. No matter what the future holds, time with your family will be...

elements.name: planning_a_family_vacation--early_mid-stage_symptoms--puzzle1
elements.incorrect_feedback: Whoops! That doesn't look right. Please wait a moment and try again.

elements.text: The more you immerse yourself in the story, the more likely you are to benefit from our program – really picture yourself in the situation at hand.
